title: Zeuxine regia
taxonomy: Zeuxine regia is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This genus is part of the subfamily Orchidoideae and tribe Cranichideae. The family Orchidaceae is further divided into several subfamilies. This classification is based on the plant's morphological and molecular characteristics.

intro: Zeuxine regia, also known as the Queen's orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia and Southeast Asia, characterized by its unique, yellow-green flowers and long, thin leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in treating conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
